_comment: WebhookConfig fixture for per-instance routing (wait_for_webhook_per_instance_routing_test.json). The wildcard value '${workflow.input.orderId}' in the task's matches map means each running instance registers a different hash, keyed by its specific orderId. Sending {"event": {"orderId": "order-123"}} routes to exactly the instance started with orderId=order-123.
name: order-event-webhook
